case_title: ARLENE URIBE RAMSAY RESPONDENT VS. OLSON & FIELDING MOVING SERVICES APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT OLSON & FIELDING MOVING SERVICES AS TO RESPONDENT RAMSAY, ARLENE URIBE HEARING SET FOR SEP-25-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
MINUTES FOR SEP-25-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-25-2002 - COURT TRIAL HELD. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE WAS INTRODUCED. THER COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR $1663 AND $50 COSTS. JPT JOSHUA WEINSTEIN, CLERK J. BAUBEL, NOT REPORTED (525)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT RAMSAY, ARLENE URIBE RECOVER FROM APPELLANT OLSON & FIELDING MOVING SERVICES $1,663.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,713.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
